poses.name: High Arch Presentation
poses.description: Standing on tiptoes, elegant high arches, soles prominently displayed, legs slightly apart, confident pose

poses.name: Sole Close-up Worship
poses.description: Lying on back with feet raised toward viewer, detailed soles and toes in sharp focus, vulnerable and inviting

poses.name: Crossed Legs Tease
poses.description: Sitting with legs elegantly crossed, one foot dangling and flexing, showing both top of foot and hint of sole

poses.name: Foot on Lap / Body Worship
poses.description: One foot resting on partner's lap or chest, toes flexing, full leg and foot in focus, intimate and controlling

poses.name: Footjob Ready Pose
poses.description: Lying on stomach or side, feet brought together toward viewer, soles facing forward, explicit and ready pose
